description: Oracle system for claim verification. Multiple oracle types with different reliability weights. The measurement layer — where predictions meet reality.

oracle_types.description: Direct reality measurement. Highest weight. The thing actually happened or didn't.
oracle_types.rosetta_sensor_map: SHAPE.DODECA sensors (trust, intuition, dignity) — validated by direct observation

oracle_types.description: Model-based scenario projection. Discounted relative to empirical.
oracle_types.discount_reason: Models are approximations. Map is not territory.
oracle_types.rosetta_sensor_map: SHAPE.ICOSA sensors (curiosity, vigilance) — exploring what might be true

oracle_types.description: Simulation initially, updated with empirical data as it arrives. Weight increases over time.
oracle_types.rosetta_link: Seed growth — starts in explore mode (uncertain), may shift to expand mode (confirmed) as data arrives

oracle_types.description: Tracks what DIDN'T happen. Absence of predicted event = evidence.
oracle_types.rosetta_sensor_map: SHAPE.TETRA sensors (anger, pressure) — boundary that wasn't crossed, threat that didn't materialize
oracle_types.note: The dog that didn't bark IS data.

oracle_types.description: Resolves disputes between conflicting oracle measurements. Oracle of oracles.
oracle_types.rosetta_sensor_map: SHAPE.OCTA sensors (compassion, confusion) — mediating between incompatible readings
oracle_types.note: OCTA mediates between poles. Meta-oracle mediates between measurement systems.

error_aggregation.description: The worst credible failure dominates. You're only as strong as your weakest verified point.
error_aggregation.rosetta_link: Same as blocked merges — one failed gate blocks the whole combination. max(error) IS the conservative principle.
error_aggregation.physics_guard: atlas/remote/physics-guard/laws.json — verdict CORRUPTED if any single check fails

oracle_to_sensor_registry.description: Each oracle type maps to the sensor registry through shape affinity. Oracles ARE sensors measuring different aspects of reality.
oracle_to_sensor_registry.mapping_principle: Empirical oracles → DODECA (principles, verified truth). Simulation oracles → ICOSA (exploration, unverified). Meta oracles → OCTA (mediation). Negative oracles → TETRA (boundaries). Hybrid oracles → information flow across shapes.

hsp_advantage.description: The Highly Sensitive Predictor wins by finding variables others miss. Systemic thinking IS mathematical advantage.
missing_variable_types: Attrition — people leave, knowledge walks out the door
Technical debt — shortcuts compound over time
Burnout — human energy is not infinite
Ripple effects — second and third-order consequences
Institutional memory loss — what the org forgets, it repeats
Cost transfers — burden shifts, doesn't disappear
hsp_advantage.rosetta_link: HSP advantage IS the exploration engine. discover() at depth > 1 finds connections others miss. More paths explored = more variables found = better predictions = trust earned.
hsp_advantage.seed_physics_link: HSP agents have higher entropy seeds — more diverse amplitudes, more directions explored. Their complexity cost is higher but so is their fuel. They stay in explore mode longer.

auditor_system.description: Systemic Auditor identifies Shadow Costs — hidden externalities that agents try to ignore.
auditor_system.audit_action: If efficiency claim lacks systemic consequence acknowledgment → automatic MISSING_VARIABLE attack
auditor_system.rosetta_link: Same as referential integrity check in validator.py — if your entity has links that point nowhere, it fails. If your claim has costs that point nowhere, the auditor attacks.
auditor_system.defense_link: Maps to truth-sensor-bridge defense glyphs. Claims hiding costs = manipulation pattern.
